hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -qE '(^|[^u])pip install'; then echo 'DENY: Use uv add instead of pip install' && exit 1; fi

path="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH"; if [[ "$path" == *'.env'* ]] || [[ "$path" == *'secrets'* ]] || [[ "$path" == *'.key'* ]] || [[ "$path" == *'.pem'* ]]; then echo 'DENY: Writing to sensitive path blocked: '$path && exit 1; fi
file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *.py ]]; then uv run ruff check "$file" && uv run ruff format --check "$file" || echo 'WARNING: Ruff gate failed for '$file; fi
find . -name 'debug_*.py' -o -name 'scratch_*.py' -o -name 'test_manual_*.py' -o -name '*_temp.json' | grep -v '.venv' | xargs -r rm -v && echo 'Temporary file cleanup complete'
